name: Gringo Margarita
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the frozen limeade concentrate and gin in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add seltzer and stir gently.
4. Serve in stemmed glasses whose rims have been dipped in lime juice, then in salt (optional) or over ice cubes in a tall glass.
5. Garnish tall glasses with fruit slices and cherries.
Serves 4.
